title: West Ham deserve to be in the Premier League - Nuno
summary: West Ham manager Nuno Espirito Santo expressed disappointment after the club's relegation from the Premier League, despite a strong final-day effort. The manager believes the team deserved to remain in the league, highlighting their performance on the season's closing match.
content: West Ham's Nuno Espirito Santo expresses his disappointment at the club's relegation despite a valiant effort on the final day of the Premier League season.

zh.title: 西汉姆应该留在英超联赛中 - 努诺
zh.summary: 西汉姆联队主教练努诺·埃斯皮里托·桑托在球队被降级出英超联赛后表达了失望，尽管球队在最后一天的比赛中表现强劲。主教练认为球队应该留在英超联赛中，强调了他们在赛季最后一场比赛中的表现。

title: Fernandes has natural instinct for creation - Carrick
summary: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes broke the Premier League assist record in the final match of the season against Brighton. Manager Michael Carrick praised Fernandes' natural instinct for creating scoring opportunities.
content: Manchester United manager Michael Carrick praises his captain Bruno Fernandes, after the midfielder broke the Premier League assist record in their win against Brighton on the final day of the league season.

zh.title: 费尔南德斯有创造机会的天赋 - 卡里克

title: 'We can look back on a very successful season' - Farke

content: Watch as Leeds boss Daniel Farke offered his condolences to relegated West Ham, while reflecting on a 'very successful and fantastic season' for his side despite a 3-0 loss on the final day.

zh.title: 我们可以回顾一个非常成功的赛季 - 法克

title: Brighton should be happy with what we achieved - Hurzeler

content: Watch as Brighton's Fabian Hurzeler says their performance against Manchester United came at the 'worst time' in their final match of the 2025-26 Premier League season.
